functional_audit.check: ChatPageContent mounts inside SHELL-10 DashboardLayout main content slot with ai_RNbBHXbD boundary
Two-column chat layout renders sidebar left and panel right, stacking on narrow viewports
Page title row and new-conversation button render with DS-01 bubbleStyle tokens and wired create handler

ui_evidence.notes: Marker on ChatPanelMount when ?conversation= is set; absent when ChatWelcomePanel (ai_RNbBHXcE) is shown — matches IR mutual-exclusion semantics deferred to CHAT-03/CHAT-06

critiques.finding: ChatPageContent right-column flex wrapper has no data-bubble-id; bTIUt marker lives on ChatPanelMount child rather than a stable layout mount wrapper under ai_RNbBHXbD.
critiques.alternative: Add a flex-1 panel-region wrapper in ChatPageContent (or pass CHAT_PANEL_MOUNT_BUBBLE_ID through the panel slot) so layout parity scans always find the right-column mount node.

critiques.finding: Root uses fixed h-[calc(100vh-3.5rem)] inside DashboardLayout main which already scrolls (overflow-y-auto), risking double-scroll or height mismatch vs IR fit_height fluid semantics.
critiques.alternative: Use h-full min-h-0 flex-1 to inherit shell main height instead of a hard-coded viewport offset.

critiques.finding: Sidebar column uses fixed md:w-64 rather than IR fluid fit_width column sizing from Bubble presentation.
critiques.alternative: Resolve ai_RNbBHXbE presentation width/fit_width from styles.json and map to proportional flex-basis or max-width tokens.
